category.scope_note: Industrial AC motor comparison for China exporters placing 0.75-1000 kW motors on the German market under EU and German surveillance rules.

target_market_label.zh: 德国（欧盟法规 / 联网局）
target_market_label.zht: 德國（歐盟法規 / 聯網局）

title.en: China-to-Germany Industrial Motor Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国工业电动机进入德国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國工業電動機進入德國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Informational comparison of China industrial AC motor baselines against Germany market entry requirements under EU Ecodesign Regulation 2019/1781, LVD, EMC, CE marking, EU representative duties, and BNetzA market surveillance.
description.zh: 中国工业交流电机基线与德国市场准入要求的信息性对照，涵盖欧盟生态设计法规 2019/1781、低压指令、EMC 指令、CE 标志、欧盟授权代表及德国联网局市场监管。
description.zht: 中國工業交流電機基線與德國市場准入要求的資訊性對照，涵蓋歐盟生態設計法規 2019/1781、低壓指令、EMC 指令、CE 標誌、歐盟授權代表及德國聯網局市場監管。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified body conformity assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or Germany market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current EU, German, BNetzA, DGUV, VDE, customs, and market-surveillance requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placing on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、通知机构合格评定、海关裁定、能效批准或德国市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核实现行欧盟、德国、联网局、DGUV、VDE、海关及市场监管要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、通知機構合格評定、海關裁定、能效批准或德國市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟、德國、聯網局、DGUV、VDE、海關及市場監管要求。

answer_first.en: For Germany, the decisive gaps are EU Regulation 2019/1781 IE3/IE4 efficiency compliance, CE marking with EU DoC under LVD and EMC, an EU-based authorised representative or responsible economic operator, and readiness for BNetzA market surveillance. CCC and China GB compliance are not recognized as German or EU market approval.
answer_first.zh: 进入德国的关键差距是欧盟法规 2019/1781 下的 IE3/IE4 能效合规、低压与 EMC 指令下的 CE 标志及欧盟符合性声明、欧盟境内授权代表或责任经济经营者，以及应对德国联网局市场监管。CCC 与中国 GB 合规不被视为德国或欧盟市场批准。
answer_first.zht: 進入德國的關鍵差距是歐盟法規 2019/1781 下的 IE3/IE4 能效合規、低壓與 EMC 指令下的 CE 標誌及歐盟符合性聲明、歐盟境內授權代表或責任經濟經營者，以及應對德國聯網局市場監管。CCC 與中國 GB 合規不被視為德國或歐盟市場批准。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: source refresh before publication and on material EU/German regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Official EU, German regulator, BNetzA, DGUV, VDE, customs, standards-body, or primary legal sources preferred; rows remain unverified until human-reviewed source confirmation is completed.
